achievements.title: Chicken dielectric
achievements.description: An immortal Chicken on a stick makes an excellent dielectric. We do not recommend trying this in real life, unless you have an immortal chicken and an immortal you

achievements.title: Small puffs of gas
achievements.description: It's indecent to fart on Earth, but farting in space can save your life by giving your body acceleration at the last moment

achievements.title: Sherlock
achievements.description: You can solve any case if you know for sure who you want to blame

achievements.title: Multilayer
achievements.description: It's warm in underpants, and you can hibernate in winter if you have a whole lot of them!

achievements.title: A contributor to the industry
achievements.description: Congratulations! If you didn't cheat, then you are helping the industry to develop! In some way, not necessarily in the right one

achievements.title: The power of the Unicorn
achievements.description: You are immune to criticism. You are simply THE best. Everything your hands get to touch and create is GENIUS. This achievement is unique and is meant to be given to no one but you. Everyone else has a fake copy of it

achievements.title: Almost served
achievements.description: When you jogged for three days in a row, prepared yourself mentally to serve in the army, boasted that you were going to be a paratrooper, and then suddenly failed all medical tests — can this be considered as "almost served", or not?

achievements.title: Heroic deed
achievements.description: There's no point in heroically covering a barrel of a beam weapon with your chest. You can, if you like, but in this case, it's just not necessary. If you really want to do it, don't forget to turn the weapon off first

achievements.title: Trust me, I'm an engineer
achievements.description: Someone else's pass works just like someone else's diploma: it allows you to connect to engineering terminals and boast that you're a hacker while simply touching "Yes"/"No" on monitors

achievements.title: Butthurt
achievements.description: The ignition of natural gas can cause not only a heated argument on some online forum but also a 20% increase in the flight speed with accelerators

achievements.title: Complete Chapter 3
achievements.description: Completing the third chapter will be almost as difficult as completing the second one. That's how it is

achievements.title: Complete Chapter 2
achievements.description: Completing the second chapter will be almost as difficult as completing the third one. That's how it is

achievements.title: Mutagen
achievements.description: Scanning the dead product of genetic engineering will help the spacesuit to replenish its library of useless images. And it might be possible to sell these pictures to the newspapers if need be

achievements.title: Destructor
achievements.description: Labor turned ape into a... more muscular ape. You have unique destruction skills, now your delicate workmanship with the handy scrapper will cause more damage to everything you touch with it

achievements.title: Shepherd
achievements.description: It's really easy to herd cows in space: just pile them up in a heap and don't touch them until the rescuers come

achievements.title: Sir, no sir!
achievements.description: Someone always has to control an army, even if it's an army of crazy coffins. A coffin squadron without a general is just a bunch of stupid meat containers, and a coffin squadron with a general is also just a bunch of stupid meat containers, but with a general. That's a fact!

achievements.title: Sharpshooter
achievements.description: It may seem that making a hundred or two shots is not so difficult, but when each shot is worth the cost of a whole space station, it's a completely different story

achievements.title: The right choice
achievements.description: Sometimes, among a thousand of options, only one is the right one. It's amazing how you managed to identify it. The greatest minds will break their heads over solving this puzzle

achievements.title: Big machine gun
achievements.description: It's fun to shoot with a blaster, but to shoot with big military spaceship blasters is a lot more fun. However, there is some bad news and some good news. The bad news is that shooting military weapons is prohibited without a license. The good news is that everyone who could have inspected this has already died

achievements.title: Undertaker
achievements.description: Living coffins are no joke. Some may think that such a situation isn't a big deal, but in reality, a dead thing being alive makes it a zombie, a zombie is a bad thing, a bad thing is a problem, a problem is serious, serious equals an investigator and an investigator equals a life sentence. In the end, do you really want to go to prison?

achievements.title: Wasted!
achievements.description: Not everyone can save the galaxy, but saving it by just sitting on the couch is beyond comprehension. Keep it up!

achievements.title: Psychiatrist
achievements.description: It's very easy to determine a person's mental disorder by the color of his spacesuit. Especially if you're a charlatan. A real professional will try to find and add all the other possible signs of the illness

achievements.title: Driver
achievements.description: The dead people flying around are highly unlikely to say "wow!" to your highly polished brand new ZAZ but it's still nice to enjoy the ride with the wind... Or without it..

achievements.title: A rebel
achievements.description: You are a rebel at heart, a rebel by nature, and a rebel by horoscope. Down with other people's advice! Stick your fingers in…

achievements.title: Airlock master
achievements.description: They teach astronauts how to dock to airlocks even before teaching them how to use the space toilet. Missing the toilet is unpleasant, but not fatal — missing the airlock is a problem

achievements.title: Hacker
achievements.description: It would be an awful thing to open coffins if we weren't talking about their back panel containing the control panel. And since it's all about the control panel, then all is well, and you can proceed to open it

achievements.title: Saboteur
achievements.description: A quick and unexpected raid on the enemy's infrastructure is very effective, brave, and only a real space fighter is worthy of doing that. We can only hope that the coffins were really building these strange stations, and not destroying them

achievements.title: Auto repair shop
achievements.description: A spring squeak, the smell of fresh engine oil, the noise of an angle grinder, and the fervent swearing of a mechanic — you can't find all this in outer space, and you never will. But what you can find is the creaking of your joints, the smell of fresh sweat, and the sound of blood in your ears. Space is a lousy place

achievements.title: Machine gunner
achievements.description: Shooting a machine gun is easy. Hitting a target with it is harder. It's even harder to hit a target with the shuttle's plasma guns when the shuttle isn't designed for them

achievements.title: Vacuum cleaner
achievements.description: The vacuum cleaner can not only help to clean the apartment quickly but can also rush through space and time like a jet motorbike. So convenient!

achievements.title: Artist
achievements.description: The artist can offend and draw anyone. Usually, this happens simultaneously

achievements.title: Pew-pew!
achievements.description: It turns out that if you bomb a liner, the anti-asteroid turrets go crazy. They go crazy by themselves, without any killer coffins' help. That's right. In any case, space will be much safer without them

achievements.title: Electronic
achievements.description: If you mess around with electricity for a long time, you might get immune to it. Probably. But it's better not to try it

achievements.title: Toucher
achievements.description: A man's palms say more than the backs of his hands, elbows, or navel. If you want to appear a strong and hard-working man in the eyes of others, you can rub your hands to get calluses that will brutally scratch other people's hands when you shake them

achievements.title: Coffin Counter
achievements.description: Finding and counting dead coffin robots is an interesting and extremely educational activity, although it's absolutely useless. If only there would be the living ones…

achievements.title: A menace to cows
achievements.description: Properly disposing of synthetic animal corpses, you can save humanity from dangerous diseases and the fertile soil from senseless pollution. You can also enjoy magnificent gore effects but that's not what matters

achievements.title: A Persistent One
achievements.description: If you press any broken button persistently, something will definitely happen. Maybe the button will break, or maybe even your finger

achievements.title: Quick draw
achievements.description: Being the fastest is a real achievement! It's a real mastery! It deserves some respect! You hear, honey?! IT'S AN ACHIEVEMENT! =(

achievements.title: Voyeur
achievements.description: Spying on people is indecent, and spying on dead people is doubly indecent. Probably. The dictionary didn't say anything about it under the word "voyeur"

achievements.title: Think with your own head
achievements.description: One can listen to other people's advice forever, but it's much more valuable to think with your own head. You learn best from your own mistakes, as someone said... Or maybe they didn't

achievements.title: Pollutionist
achievements.description: "It's a bad thing to destroy the whole garbage collecting infrastructure for selfish purposes," so my mother says. Although who cares, anyway? Isn't that a cleaner robot in the distance?

achievements.title: Bandit
achievements.description: Attacking a security robot is a felony, even if no one saw you do it. On the other hand, it is still a felony, so there is nothing good about it

achievements.title: Cartographer
achievements.description: Being able to orientate yourself is an extremely important skill for any traveler. Don't forget to mark the landmarks that are visible from afar, keep an eye on the moss on tree trunks, and don't forget about the North star and your compass. Especially, if you're not in space

achievements.title: Ice breaker
achievements.description: It would be more correct to call this reward "An Ice-Shooter", but it sounds weird. In any case, the fewer unattended blocks of ice of questionable quality in space, the fewer people will be poisoned by poor-quality water in the future. Well, that's sanitary!

achievements.title: Careful driver
achievements.description: Either a very drunk, or a very meticulous pilot who wants to get a special achievement in his career would wipe all the asteroids in the area with a bottom of a space shuttle. It's up to you to decide, which one you want to be

achievements.title: Dodger
achievements.description: When your life hangs in the balance, oxygen is left for one breath, the world is in danger, and death and suffering surround you — fly through all the rings!

achievements.title: Competitor
achievements.description: With all due respect to the work of repair robots, they are useless competitors that consume resources. These guys are not subject to reprogramming and will fix everything that gets in their manipulators: shuttles, the liner's debris, vehicles, killer coffins…

achievements.title: The breathtaking!
achievements.description: Believing in yourself and never giving up, even when everything is useless and scripted, is breathtaking! No, you're breathtaking!

achievements.title: Better With a Friend

achievements.title: Wrong Kind of "Chopper"
achievements.description: Killed 1,000 zombies while riding a motorcycle. Chainsaws on the side make it easier

achievements.title: Come on! Follow Me!
achievements.description: Escorted 8 survivors at once. It's a party, everyone is invited!

achievements.title: Big Spender
achievements.description: Spent $6,000,000 total in Fortune City. Where did you get all that money?

achievements.title: Father of the Year

achievements.title: Masquerade
achievements.description: Had 10 zombies with masks on at once. You showed them who's boss!

achievements.title: Custom Finish

achievements.title: Zombie Fu

achievements.title: Life Saver
